title: Indian standalone diagnostic lab — LOS-agnostic B2B referral
description: Independent single-site Indian diagnostic lab (45k slides/yr, 3 pathologist FTE, B2B referral-driven, ₹65L scanner). No inpatient beds, no OR, no LOS attribution. This is the flagship case for the gap DPA and Sectra both ignore: commercial growth, subspecialty routing, and consult revenue scalability as primary value levers.

comparative.dpa_coverage: missing — DPA has no B2B referrer acquisition or subspecialty retention categories (context md line 273)
comparative.sectra_coverage: missing — Sectra's 'slide retrieval' is internal retrieval not subspecialty routing
